title: Glop bomb
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Glop bombs''' were a type of armament used by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[StealthX]] fighters. They were essentially a bomb that spread a quick-hardening foam over an area. A group of rogue [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], led by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], used them during the [[Raid on Supply Depot Thrago]]. They worked in a fashion similar to that of [[G-20 Glop grenade/Legends|glop grenades]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''
